description:
Bforartists is a fork of the popular 3D software Blender, with the goal to improve the UI.


The Node Editor Upgrade Hotfix Version 🍝
Bforartists 5 0 1 - Splash Large
Bforartists 5 0 1 Screenshot
This point version is a stablity and hotfix release focused on new Compositor assets that come out of the box, new smart asset updates and apply operators, and much much love to the node editors.
This is part of all the latest from Blender 5.0.1 and 5.1.0 to the date - with 53 new fixes and polish with much stability from Blender!
⚠️ Warning: *.Blend File formats from this version onwards will not be backwards compatible with earlier versions of Blender 4.5.x or Bforartists 4.4.x. It's a one way trip!
What's new:
- Fixed the export/import unusable File dialogue when using the Bforartists hotkeys
- More Icons in data types in Geometry Nodes Selectors
- Fixed instancing options from the Asset Shelf drag and drop
- Fixed Dopesheet missing operators
- Fixed Hotkey dropdown icon
- Cleaned up the Node Editor Sidebars to be consistent with Add menu
- Cleaned up the Preferences NDOF settings
Additional Features from this Blender 5.0.x and 5.1.x series:
- New Bone Info node for Geoemtry Nodes
And many bug fixes more!
Downloads available from both Github, the official Website, Windows store and Blender Launcher v2
📥 Downloads:
https://www.bforartists.de/download/
🪟 Windows App
Windows App Store
🧡 Blender Launcher
Github Release
For Arch
📝 Release Notes:
https://www.bforartists.de/release-notes/
🗒️ Blender Release notes now merged and updated into Bforartists:
https://www.blender.org/download/releases/
Splashscreen is kindly provided by Bluenile3D, the latest winner of the Splashscreen submissions competition hosted in the Discord server! Thank you!
And also, thanks again for all art, love, feedback and help for making the Bforartists community what it is today! Without your feedback and support, this wouldn't be possible
Draise, Reiner, Blenux (Juso), Znight (Trung Pham), Quackers, Eyad, Sean and all you arty supporters
